title: AI/ML Engineer
description:
Currently on SINTRA — a 4-layer real-time tracking analytics stack for a European industrial IoT client. Built the ETL pipeline, InfluxDB storage model, 3 Grafana dashboards, and 6 alert rules. Phase 1 of 10 delivered and approved.

Previously shipped SplitIT, a Stripe ACH-based income-splitting platform, end-to-end — which earned me the SINTRA engagement.
